title: High tim atkins scores for De krans
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The Cape Vintage Reserve...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Cape Vintage Reserve 2022 was De Krans' top scorer this year after receiving an impressive 94 points by revered UK authority Tim Atkin MW, in his highly anticipated annual South African Wine Report.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Cape Vintage Reserve 2022 was De Krans' top scorer this year after receiving an impressive 94 points by revered UK authority Tim Atkin MW, in his highly anticipated annual South African Wine Report."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This reaffirmed the statement that De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp remains without a doubt one of SA’s leading port producers.","html":"This reaffirmed the statement that De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp remains without a doubt one of SA’s leading port producers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the port-style wine took top honours, a further four of De Krans’ wines received a score of 90+.The Cape Tawny Limited Release and Tritonia Red 2022 each received 92 points, with the Garden Route Sauvignon Blanc 2024 scoring 91, and the Touriga Nacional 2022 90 points out of a possible 100. Atkin, a British Master of Wine and accomplished wine commentator with extensive experience of South African wines, tasted a total of 2,256 wines from 425 producers for his 2024 Special Report.","html":"While the port-style wine took top honours, a further four of De Krans’ wines received a score of 90+.
The Cape Tawny Limited Release and Tritonia Red 2022 each received 92 points, with the Garden Route Sauvignon Blanc 2024 scoring 91, and the Touriga Nacional 2022 90 points out of a possible 100. Atkin, a British Master of Wine and accomplished wine commentator with extensive experience of South African wines, tasted a total of 2,256 wines from 425 producers for his 2024 Special Report."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Consistently a top achiever in Atkin’s SA Wine Report, the Cape Vintage Reserve Port is best described as a big wine full of ripe dark fruit notes of plum, mulberry, and black currants.","html":"Consistently a top achiever in Atkin’s SA Wine Report, the Cape Vintage Reserve Port is best described as a big wine full of ripe dark fruit notes of plum, mulberry, and black currants."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Well-rounded with smooth dark chocolate undertones and firm tannins are prominent in this port-style wine that would mature well over 30 years. Without a doubt one to add to your collection, the De Krans Cape Vintage Reserve Port 2022 will be available directly from the cellar towards the end of the year.","html":"Well-rounded with smooth dark chocolate undertones and firm tannins are prominent in this port-style wine that would mature well over 30 years. Without a doubt one to add to your collection, the De Krans Cape Vintage Reserve Port 2022 will be available directly from the cellar towards the end of the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information on the impressive range of wines from De Krans, visit www.dekrans.co.za.","html":"For more information on the impressive range of wines from De Krans, visit www.dekrans.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
